title: Apply trusted calendar Analysis Windows
description: Define one unambiguous operation-start As-of Instant and fixed Africa/Johannesburg calendar windows over LEDGER Effective Dates. Goal trace: G1 and G2.
rationale: Implicit clocks, locale weeks, rolling ranges, and historical-state claims can reverse the meaning of pace and comparison results.
story_want: daily, weekly, and monthly results to use fixed visible calendar boundaries
story_so_that: the same request cannot be interpreted with different time semantics
acceptance_criteria: Given any report generation, when processing starts, then one trusted TimeProvider instant is frozen before producer reads and returned as the As-of Instant in Source Provenance.
Given any As-of Instant, when its local date is derived, then the fixed IANA timezone Africa/Johannesburg is used and host locale is ignored.
Given a day window, when its bounds are returned, then it contains the single As-of local calendar date intersected with the selected Budget Period.
Given a week window, when its bounds are returned, then it begins Monday, ends Sunday, and is clipped to the selected Budget Period.
Given a month-to-date window, when its bounds are returned, then it begins on the Budget Period start and ends on the earlier of the As-of local date or period end, inclusive.
Given a Budget Period completed before the As-of local date, when the month window is returned, then the full Budget Period is selected.
Given a Budget Period starting after the As-of local date, when elapsed-time metrics are requested, then Not Started is returned and no zero-spend or pace interpretation is fabricated.
Given a rolling-day or rolling-week policy request, when it is validated, then Unsupported Analysis Window is returned before financial processing.
Given transaction membership in any window, when actuals are grouped, then LEDGER Effective Date controls membership and posting time or invocation time does not move a transaction between dates.

Given a historical Budget Period, when a report is generated now, then the report states that current corrected producer evidence was used and does not claim to reconstruct the source state that existed at a past As-of Instant.
